title: CABIDL Boundary Block
description: Defines an architectural boundary — an interface or contract between components. The specification property points to the formal definition of the boundary.

exposure.description: Whether this boundary is external (user/world-facing, e.g. CLI, REST API) or internal (component-to-component contract).

specification.description: Pointer to the formal specification that defines this boundary.

path.description: Path to the file or directory containing the specification, relative to the root CABIDL document.

typeDescription.description: A human/AI-readable description of the specification type (e.g. "OpenAPI Schema", "CLAP YAML", "Rust Traits", "gRPC Proto").
